title: Vegapunk Names the Prize of the Era
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Emeth, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Giants as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I want to apologize to you, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...No chance he would still be alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did you mistake me for someone else?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You look just like him... it was nostalgic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My feelings from that day came rushing back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is bad! We're going to sink!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
